backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the IELTS practice test backend with data models for tests, questions, student responses, and feedback, plus authenticated CRUD operations for tests and unauthenticated CRUD for student responses with automated scoring logic.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that ResponseViewer displays an AuthModal requiring username and password before executing any student response deletion.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and key implementation details for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file importing Tailwind directives and defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point titled "Hexa's Beanibazar" that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing top-level app state (view mode, selected test, responses) and rendering the header, sidebar TestManagementPanel, dynamic RightPanelContainer, and Footer.
frontend/src/components/AuthModal.tsx: Reusable authentication dialog that collects username and password, validates credentials via an injected onLogin callback, and calls onSuccess with the captured credentials on success.
Modal dialog for creating new tests that accepts pre-authenticated credentials from the parent, builds the backend test object via useTestForm, and submits it through the useCreateTest mutation with toast notifications and validation error display.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying "Powered By Hexa's Beanibazar" and "Developed By Sayem Ahtesham" in small, muted text.
A form component for building individual test questions, supporting multiple question types, option management, and file uploads (image/audio) with progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/ReadingTestLayou: A two-panel layout component that displays a reading passage on the left and scrollable questions with answer inputs on the right.
frontend/src/components/ResponseDetailsP: Displays detailed information for a single student response including scores, answers, and allows authenticated teachers to submit written feedback.
frontend/src/components/ResponseViewer.t: Lists all student responses in a searchable table with delete (auth-gated) and view actions, delegating to ResponseDetailsPanel when a response is selected.
frontend/src/components/ResultsPanel.tsx: Shows a student's test results summary (score, IELTS band, accuracy, time) with an optional toggle to reveal correct answers per question.
frontend/src/components/RightPanelContai: Routes the right-panel content between TestInterface, ResultsPanel, ResponseViewer, or a welcome placeholder based on the current app view mode.
frontend/src/components/StudentRegistrat: A modal dialog that collects a student's name and batch number before allowing them to start a test.
frontend/src/components/TestInterface.ts: Main test-taking UI component that manages student registration, answer collection, timer display, fullscreen mode, and test submission for both reading and standard test types.
frontend/src/components/TestManagementPa: Admin panel component for listing, searching, filtering, creating, and deleting tests, with authentication gating for privileged actions.
frontend/src/components/TestQuestionDisp: Renders a single test question with appropriate input controls (radio, text input, textarea) based on question type, and displays associated media (image or audio) if present.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) actors, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts: Simple session-storage-backed authentication hook with hardcoded credentials, providing login, logout, and credential retrieval functions.
frontend/src/hooks/useFullscreen.ts: Hook that wraps the browser Fullscreen API to provide enter/exit fullscreen callbacks and tracks current fullscreen state.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for CRUD operations on tests and student responses, including fetching, creating, updating, deleting, and submitting feedback via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useResponseManagement: Provides a hook that filters student responses by student name based on a search term using memoization.
frontend/src/hooks/useTestFiltering.ts: Provides a hook for filtering a list of tests by search term and test type, with state management for both filter values.
frontend/src/hooks/useTestForm.ts: Manages test creation form state including questions, validation, and conversion of form data to the backend Test type.
frontend/src/hooks/useTestSubmission.ts: Handles test submission logic by scoring answers, calculating IELTS band scores, and persisting a StudentResponse via the createStudentResponse mutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useTestTimer.ts: Implements a countdown/elapsed timer hook with start, pause, reset controls and formatted time output.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines light/dark mode CSS custom properties using OKLCH color values.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with OKLCH-based design tokens, custom border radii, box shadows, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking existing features, a known issue about missing auth on delete responses, and a pending fix request to add username/password authentication before deleting student responses.
